prompt: Create a cinematic 35mm film photograph of a lone person in a long dark coat standing near the center of an abandoned industrial warehouse at golden hour. The building is vast, decayed, and partially ruined, with tall broken window frames across the back wall, exposed steel beams, cracked concrete columns, peeling paint, rusted railings, debris, dry weeds, and overgrown plants pushing through the floor. The low sun shines directly through the left-center windows, producing a bright warm flare and long dramatic shadows stretching across the dusty concrete toward the camera. Compose in a wide 16:9 horizontal frame with the subject small against the architecture, slightly right of center, facing the glowing windows, creating a quiet contemplative mood. Use natural warm amber sunlight mixed with deep cool shadows, high dynamic range, realistic texture, visible film grain, slight softness, and analog color grading. Add strong accidental film light leaks: a vertical saturated red-pink band along the far left edge and a warm orange-red flare bleeding in from the right edge. Photorealistic, atmospheric, documentary-style urban exploration photography, no text, no watermark.
